name: reputation-kernel
description: Full-stack monorepo for reputation kernel project with Ethereum contracts, Hardhat tasks, CCIP-Read gateway, and Docker Compose configurations

scripts.contracts:deploy: cd packages/contracts && forge script script/DeployLocal.s.sol --rpc-url http://localhost:8545 --private-key $PRIVATE_KEY --broadcast
scripts.setup:dev: pnpm install && pnpm fork:base && pnpm fork:eth && sleep 10 && pnpm deploy:local && pnpm seed:demo
